CustomField.label: Full Name
CustomField.description: Patient's full name — Annexure C1.1 core person attribute. One of the three inputs (with DOB + mobile) normalized into VS_Match_Key__c for exact-match de-dup (D-011/D-017); required because the match key cannot be computed without it. The standard "Patient Record" Name field is a non-PII auto-number identifier, deliberately kept separate from this field to avoid duplicating PII into a field commonly surfaced in list views/global search (FLS restricts this field independently). NOT an Aadhaar or other government-ID field.
